/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/quicklearn_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/pages/mainwindow.cpp.o -o quicklearn  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.9.3
